allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''c:/MoodGames/Playable Ads/Playables/Coin Sort/CoinSortLongSlotV6/Cos-LongSlotV6-60sec.html'',''utf8''\); const idx=html.indexOf\(''frozenModel:''\); console.log\(''found at'', idx\); const q1=html.indexOf\(''""'',idx\); const q2=html.indexOf\(''""'',q1+1\); console.log\(''value start:'', JSON.stringify\(html.slice\(q1,q1+60\)\)\); const b64start=html.indexOf\(''base64,'',idx\)+7; const b64end=html.indexOf\(''""'',b64start\); console.log\(''b64 length:'', b64end-b64start\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const html=fs.readFileSync\(''c:/MoodGames/Playable Ads/Playables/Coin Sort/CoinSortLongSlotV6/Cos-LongSlotV6-60sec.html'',''utf8''\); const idx=html.indexOf\(''frozenModel:''\); const b64start=html.indexOf\(''base64,'',idx\)+7; const b64end=html.indexOf\(''""'',b64start\); const b64=html.slice\(b64start,b64end\); const buf=Buffer.from\(b64,''base64''\); const jsonLen=buf.readUInt32LE\(12\); const jsonStr=buf.slice\(20,20+jsonLen\).toString\(''utf8''\); const gltf=JSON.parse\(jsonStr\); gltf.meshes.forEach\(\(m,i\)=>console.log\(''mesh'',i,m.name\)\); gltf.nodes.forEach\(n=>console.log\(''node'',n.name,''mesh:'',n.mesh,''scale:'',JSON.stringify\(n.scale\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const html=fs.readFileSync\(''c:/MoodGames/Playable Ads/Playables/Coin Sort/CoinSortLongSlotV6/Cos-LongSlotV6-60sec.html'',''utf8''\);const checks=[[''FrozenNormalMapScale constant'',html.includes\(''FrozenNormalMapScale  = 1.0''\)],[''normalMapTex loaded'',html.includes\(''ASSETS.frozenNormalMap ? loadB64Texture''\)],[''normalMap assigned'',html.includes\(''normalMap: normalMapTex''\)],[''normalScale set'',html.includes\(''normalScale: new THREE.Vector2\(FrozenNormalMapScale''\)]];checks.forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(v?''OK'':''FAIL'',k\)\);")
